title: GCP Service Account
description: GCP credentials for Google Cloud Composer. Supports service account values, credentials path, workload identity (external account), and ADC. Tokens are auto-refreshed at runtime.

iapAudience.title: IAP Audience
iapAudience.description: OAuth 2.0 client ID of the IAP-protected backend (Cloud Composer). When omitted, OpenMetadata auto-detects it by following the IAP redirect. Set this only when auto-detection is blocked (custom domains, private IAP, restricted egress). Find it in GCP Console -> Security -> Identity-Aware Proxy -> the Composer backend's OAuth 2.0 Client ID.
